overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a futuristic dystopian city. The character navigates urban streets, crosses intersections, and enters a hotel courtyard with neon signage and industrial architecture under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with futuristic stadium view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a concrete building wall, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
large circular futuristic building with glass and metal structure visible ahead
tall modern street lamp with horizontal light fixture

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside a tall wall, with a large futuristic stadium structure visible in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and the overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the urban environment.

events.description: exits sidewalk and enters the open intersection crosswalk
vehicles pass through the intersection while crossing the street
turns left and enters covered area beneath elevated transit structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left to walk under the overpass, navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall distinctive yellow building with neon signage and geometric patterns
traffic signal pole with green walk signal illuminated
large elevated concrete and metal transit way with pipes running overhead

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an open intersection with a prominent yellow neon building on the left, then turns left to walk beneath a massive elevated transit structure. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the environment transitions from open sky to a semi-covered walkway.

events.description: approaching the Los Palos Hotel entrance with visible neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward the hotel entrance, passing by NPCs gathered near debris

notable_agents.action: two NPCs standing near cardboard boxes and debris by the fence

entered.detail: concrete structure with teal 'Brandon' signage mounted on the wall
green neon sign reading 'Los Palos Hotel' above the entrance
black metal fence running along the left side of the walkway
rusted metal canopy structure over the hotel entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated transit structure, the character approaches the entrance to the Los Palos Hotel, marked by green neon signage. The area features a mix of concrete structures, metal fencing, and scattered debris, with NPCs standing near the entrance.

events.description: enters the open courtyard of the Los Palos Hotel from the street entrance

agents.ego_description: walking into the hotel courtyard and proceeding toward the center, passing a vending machine

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near the vending machine on the right side of the entrance

entered.detail: multi-story hotel building with weathered facades and balconies surrounding the courtyard
rusted metal walkways and staircases connecting upper floors of the hotel
red and white vending machine near the courtyard entrance
large water puddle reflecting the sky on the cracked asphalt ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters the open courtyard of the Los Palos Hotel, surrounded by multi-story buildings with elevated metal walkways. The ground is cracked asphalt with puddles, and a vending machine stands near the entrance as the character walks deeper into the courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bleak urban landscape that transitions from open city streets into the enclosed courtyard of a futuristic hotel. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a tall wall, with a distant stadium visible under a diffused, overcast sky. As the character crosses an open intersection past a prominent yellow neon building, the scene shifts from the open air to a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive elevated transit structure. The camera then follows the character past metal fencing and scattered debris toward the green neon signage of the Los Palos Hotel entrance. Finally, the environment opens into a hotel courtyard of cracked asphalt and puddles, surrounded by multi-story buildings and elevated metal walkways.
